text: OSINTdefender He’s truly lost it. In a long ranting post earlier on TruthSocial, President Donald J. Trump launched a brutal attack against some of previous strongest supporters, including Conservative commentators Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones, who have recently begun to criticize Trump for the Iran War, Epstein Files, and other moves that they consider against his agenda of “MAGA” and “America First.” President Trump, in the post, call the above named commentators, “Low IQs…stupid people..NUT JOBS, TROUBLEMAKERS,” who he says have, “Third Rate Podcasts, but nobody's talking about them, and their views are the opposite of MAGA - Or I wouldn't have won the Presidential Election in a LANDSLIDE. MAGA agrees with me, and just gave CNN a 100% Approval Rating of "TRUMP," not Hand Flailing Fools like Tucker Carlson.” - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 他真的疯了。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统早些时候在 TruthSocial 上发布了一篇冗长的咆哮帖，对一些以前最坚定的支持者发起了猛烈抨击，其中包括保守派评论员塔克·卡尔森 (Tucker Carlson)、梅根·凯利 (Megyn Kelly)、坎迪斯·欧文斯 (Candace Owens) 和亚历克斯·琼斯 (Alex Jones)。这些人最近开始因伊朗战争、爱泼斯坦文件以及其他他们认为违背其“MAGA”（让美国再次伟大）和“美国优先”议程的举动而批评特朗普。特朗普总统在帖子中称上述评论员为“低智商……愚蠢的人……疯子、麻烦制造者”，并称他们拥有“三流播客，但没人谈论他们，他们的观点与 MAGA 相反——否则我就不会以压倒性优势赢得总统大选。MAGA 同意我的观点，刚刚给了 CNN 对‘特朗普’100% 的支持率，而不是像塔克·卡尔森那样挥舞双手的傻瓜。” - OSINTdefender 推文

text: OSINTdefender After appearing to express his support for the tolls yesterday, claiming that it could a “joint venture” in the future between Iran and the United States, President Trump has now stated that Iran “better not be” charging fees on tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz, and if they are “they better stop now!” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在昨天似乎表达了对通行费的支持，并声称这可能是伊朗和美国未来“合资企业”的一部分后，特朗普总统现在表示，伊朗“最好不要”对通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收取费用，如果他们正在收取，“他们最好现在就停止！” 推文

text: OSINTdefender First Lady Melania Trump this morning, in a rare and unusual statement from the White House, denied her involvement or any relationship with late convicted sex offender and trafficker Jeffrey Epstein, calling for Congress “to act” against his co-conspirators and accomplices, while providing a public hearing for the victims of Epstein. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普今天上午在白宫发表了一份罕见且不同寻常的声明，否认她与已故被定罪的性犯罪者和人口贩子杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 有任何牵连或关系，呼吁国会“采取行动”打击他的同谋和帮凶，同时为爱泼斯坦的受害者提供公开听证会。 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Prime Minister's Office: “Pakistan Defence Minister’s call for Israel’s annihilation is outrageous. This is not a statement that can be tolerated from any government, especially not from one that claims to be a neutral arbiter for peace.” Pakistan Defense Minister, Khawaja Asif: Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 总理办公室：“巴基斯坦国防部长呼吁消灭以色列是令人愤慨的。这不是任何政府所能容忍的声明，尤其是那些声称自己是中立和平仲裁者的政府。” 巴基斯坦国防部长卡瓦贾·阿西夫 (Khawaja Asif)：以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒。当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民正在被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上制造了这个癌变国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人在地狱中燃烧。 - Open Source Intel 推文

President DONALD J. TRUMP" @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Chairman of Iran's National Security Commission on the Strait of Hormuz: "No vessel passes through the strait without the permission and authorization of our armed forces." Legislation is advancing to formally establish Iran's absolute sovereignty over the strait, but it is almost enacted on the groud. "The strait is completely under control, under surveillance. All movements and passages are under the strict, precise, and calculated control of our armed forces." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗国家安全委员会主席谈霍尔木兹海峡：“没有船只可以在未经我们武装部队许可和授权的情况下通过海峡。” 旨在正式确立伊朗对海峡绝对主权的立法正在推进，但实际上几乎已经实施。“海峡完全处于控制和监视之下。所有移动和通行都处于我们武装部队严格、精确和经过计算的控制之下。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 "Time is running out" - Iranian Parliament Speaker and potential negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, reposted Iranian conditions for a ceasefire. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “时间不多了” - 伊朗议会议长兼潜在谈判代表穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫 (Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf) 转发了伊朗的停火条件。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Zelensky: Ukraine has repeatedly stated that we are ready for mirror steps. We proposed a ceasefire for the Easter holidays this year and will act accordingly. People need an Easter without threats and a real movement towards peace, and Russia has a chance not to return to strikes after Easter.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：乌克兰已多次声明我们准备采取对等步骤。我们提议今年复活节停火，并将据此行事。人们需要一个没有威胁的复活节，需要向和平迈出真正的一步，俄罗斯有机会在复活节后不再恢复袭击。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The Israeli Prime Minister's Office and Foreign Affairs Minister Gideon Sa'ar strongly condemned the Pakistani Defence Minister's social media post describing Israel as "cancerous," labeling the remarks as antisemitic blood libels and an intolerable call for the nation's annihilation. The Prime Minister Office's firmly rejected Pakistan's credibility as a neutral peace mediator in light of the hostile rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 以色列总理办公室和外交部长吉德翁·萨尔 (Gideon Sa'ar) 强烈谴责巴基斯坦国防部长在社交媒体上将以色列描述为“癌变”的帖子，称这些言论是反犹太主义的血腥诽谤，是令人无法容忍的消灭国家的呼吁。鉴于这种敌对言论，总理办公室坚决拒绝承认巴基斯坦作为中立和平调解人的可信度。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump attacked former allies in a TruthSocial post for criticizing the conflict with Iran, calling them low IQ. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普在 TruthSocial 帖子上攻击前盟友，因为他们批评与伊朗的冲突，称他们智商低。 @wfwitness

text: A large group of chimpanzees in Uganda’s Kibale National Park split into two rival factions, sparking a deadly conflict, according to a study in Science. The group—once about 200 strong—lived cooperatively for decades, but began dividing around 2015 after key social males died and a new alpha rose to power. By 2018, the split was complete, with no remaining social ties. The two groups then turned violent. The smaller faction launched coordinated attacks, killing adult males and later targeting infants. At least 24 chimpanzees have died so far, though the true number is likely higher. The violence is still ongoing. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 根据《科学》杂志的一项研究，乌干达基巴莱国家公园的一大群黑猩猩分裂成两个敌对派系，引发了致命的冲突。该群体曾经有约 200 只，几十年来一直合作生活，但在 2015 年左右，随着关键的社会雄性死亡和新的阿尔法雄性掌权，该群体开始分裂。到 2018 年，分裂完成，不再有任何社会联系。这两个群体随后变得暴力。较小的派系发动了协同攻击，杀死了成年雄性，后来又以幼崽为目标。到目前为止，至少有 24 只黑猩猩死亡，尽管真实数字可能更高。暴力仍在继续。来源：华尔街日报

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Donald Trump must be so tired of winning. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普一定对胜利感到厌倦了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 The U.S. State Department has summoned Iraqi Ambassador Nazar Al-Khirullah in order to express the U.S. deep condemnation of attacks by Iraqi militias on U.S. diplomatic personnel and facilities. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 美国国务院传唤了伊拉克大使纳扎尔·阿尔-基鲁拉 (Nazar Al-Khirullah)，以表达美国对伊拉克民兵袭击美国外交人员和设施的深切谴责。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: Tucker Carlson couldn’t even finish College... Perhaps he should see a good psychiatrist!
text_zh: 特朗普：塔克·卡尔森甚至没能读完大学……也许他应该去看一位好的精神科医生！

text: Trump: “Crazy” Candace Owens, who accuses the Highly Respected First Lady of France of being a man, when she is not, and will hopefully win lots of money in the ongoing lawsuit. Actually, to me, the First Lady of France is a far more beautiful woman than Candace, in fact, it’s not even close!
text_zh: 特朗普：“疯狂的”坎迪斯·欧文斯，她指责受人尊敬的法国第一夫人是男人，而事实并非如此，希望她在正在进行的诉讼中赢得大笔钱。事实上，对我来说，法国第一夫人比坎迪斯漂亮得多，事实上，根本没法比！

text: Trump lashes out at Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones in a long Truth Social post: They have one thing in common — low IQs. They’re stupid people… everyone knows it.
text_zh: 特朗普在 Truth Social 的一篇长文中抨击塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯：他们有一个共同点——低智商。他们是愚蠢的人……每个人都知道这一点。

text: 🇺🇸 "I know why Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones have all been fighting me for years, especially by the fact that they think it is wonderful for Iran, the Number One State Sponsor of Terror, to have a Nuclear Weapon - Because they have one thing in common, Low IQs." - The Window Licker crashes out over conservative media personalities. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我知道为什么塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯多年来一直与我作对，特别是他们认为让头号恐怖主义支持国伊朗拥有核武器是一件美妙的事情——因为他们有一个共同点，那就是低智商。” - 这位“舔窗者”在保守派媒体人物身上崩溃了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 9-year-old Palestinian girl Ritaj Rihan was shot and killed by Israeli fire while sitting in class inside a makeshift tent classroom at Abu Ubaida Al-Jarrah School in Beit Lahia, northern Gaza.
text_zh: 9 岁的巴勒斯坦女孩里塔杰·里汉 (Ritaj Rihan) 在加沙北部拜特拉希亚的阿布·乌拜达·贾拉学校 (Abu Ubaida Al-Jarrah School) 的临时帐篷教室里上课时，被以色列炮火击中身亡。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CBS: U.S. President was informed and agreed that the ceasefire agreement included Lebanon. On the day of the ceasefire Israel had also agreed to the terms of the deal brokered by Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif, which, as announced, included Lebanon in the ceasefire agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CBS：美国总统获悉并同意停火协议包括黎巴嫩。在停火当天，以色列也同意了由巴基斯坦总理谢里夫斡旋的协议条款，正如所宣布的那样，该协议包括黎巴嫩在停火协议中。 @wfwitness

text: Trump lashed out at NATO allies in a tense closed-door meeting with Secretary-General Mark Rutte, criticizing their refusal to support the Iran conflict. “It went shit… nothing but a tirade of insults,” one European official said, adding Trump “apparently threatened to do just about anything.” Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 特朗普在与秘书长马克·吕特的一次紧张的闭门会议中抨击北约盟国，批评他们拒绝支持伊朗冲突。“情况很糟糕……除了谩骂之外什么都没有，”一位欧洲官员说，并补充说特朗普“显然威胁要采取任何行动。” 来源：POLITICO

text: 🇵🇰 "Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell." - Khawaja M. Asif, Minister of Defense of Pakistan 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇰 “以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒。当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民正在被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上制造了这个癌变国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人在地狱中燃烧。” - 巴基斯坦国防部长卡瓦贾·M·阿西夫 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike targeted Khirbet al-Dweir on the outskirts of the town of Al-Babliyeh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部 Al-Babliyeh 镇郊区的 Khirbet al-Dweir。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "1 ballistic missile was launched to the Haifa area" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli airstrikes targeted the ballistic missile launch site in Eastern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“1 枚弹道导弹向海法地区发射” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩东部的弹道导弹发射场。 @wfwitness

text: A new report from the Yale Humanitarian Research Lab (HRL) says satellite imagery strongly suggests that an Ethiopian military base near Asosa, close to the Sudan border, has been providing logistical support to Sudan’s UAE-backed Rapid Support Forces (RSF) over the past five months. Researchers identified multiple indicators of assistance, including: — Delivery and unloading of pickup-style “technical” vehicles. — On-site installation of heavy weapons mounts. — Presence of personnel not typical of standard Ethiopian military operations. — Vehicle and supply movements that align with RSF offensives in Sudan’s Blue Nile State. The base appears to function as a resupply, refueling, housing, and vehicle modification hub roughly 100 km from the Sudan border, making it strategically positioned for cross-border operations.
text_zh: 耶鲁大学人道主义研究实验室 (HRL) 的一份新报告称，卫星图像强烈表明，靠近苏丹边境的阿索萨附近的一个埃塞俄比亚军事基地在过去五个月里一直为苏丹阿联酋支持的快速支援部队 (RSF) 提供后勤支持。研究人员确定了多个援助指标，包括：——交付和卸载皮卡式“技术”车辆。——现场安装重型武器支架。——存在不属于标准埃塞俄比亚军事行动的人员。——车辆和补给移动与 RSF 在苏丹青尼罗州的攻势一致。该基地似乎是一个补给、加油、住房和车辆改装中心，距离苏丹边境约 100 公里，使其在战略上适合跨境行动。

text: 🇸🇦 NEW— Saudi Arabia details attacks on energy facilities - 1 Saudi security worker killed, 7 other Saudis injured. - East-West Pipeline Pumping Station — 700,000 bpd throughput reduction - Manifa Production Facility: 300,000 bpd reduction - Khurais Facility: 300,000 bpd reduction Other infrastructure affected: - SATORP Refinery (Jubail) - Ras Tanura Refinery - SAMREF Refinery (Yanbu) - Riyadh Refinery - Ju’aymah Processing Facilities: Fires affecting LPG & NGL exports ✍ From no impacts to many impacts overnight
text_zh: 🇸🇦 新消息— 沙特阿拉伯详细说明了对能源设施的袭击 - 1 名沙特安全人员死亡，7 名沙特人受伤。 - 东西管道泵站 — 每日 70 万桶的吞吐量减少 - Manifa 生产设施：每日 30 万桶的减少 - Khurais 设施：每日 30 万桶的减少 其他受影响的基础设施： - SATORP 炼油厂（朱拜勒） - Ras Tanura 炼油厂 - SAMREF 炼油厂（延布） - 利雅得炼油厂 - Ju’aymah 加工设施：火灾影响 LPG 和 NGL 出口 ✍ 从一夜之间没有影响到产生许多影响

text: Iran prefers dealing with JD Vance because it doesn’t trust previous U.S. negotiators—especially Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 伊朗更倾向于与 JD 万斯打交道，因为它不信任以前的美国谈判代表——尤其是史蒂夫·威特科夫 (Steve Witkoff) 和贾里德·库什纳 (Jared Kushner)。来源：CBS 新闻
